body:
PR #3668 Introduced ambiguity for `TracerAdvection` on `ImmersedBoundaryGrid`s
This PR removes the ambiguity and adds a test to make sure this method is tested
title: Disambiguate tracer fluxes on an immersed boundary

body: This PR introduces a distributed pressure solver for grids that are stretched in one direction. The algorithm implemented here is the same as the one described in #2538 but it uses the FFT and transposes built in #3279
title: Distributed tridiagonal Fourier solver
